name: io.github.michielinksee/linksee-memory
description: Local-first cross-agent memory that enforces your decisions. 10 MCP tools: remember/recall/read_smart + drift tools (drift_status/check_decision/declare_anchor/resolve_drift/flag_proposals/dream/resolve_proposal) + a re-injection guard (Claude Code hooks) that re-surfaces locked decisions BEFORE the agent acts — and blocks hard contradictions. 6-layer WHY structure, AST diff cache, works across Claude/Cursor/GPT/Codex/Gemini.
